set.body: Latest pushed R-CMD-check workflow for commit 9aed9b863108e0e875050e49796c0688d4844c84 failed while fast-gates passed. Run URL: https://github.com/bbuchsbaum/amatrix/actions/runs/28560336470. Failed jobs: macos-latest release, windows-latest release, ubuntu-latest release, ubuntu-latest devel. Linux release log evidence includes missing irlba in irlba_native test, opencl selected where tests expected cpu preferred_backend, backend startup policy probe output missing expected allowed/available markers, Matrix generic subprocess error getDLLRegisteredRoutines.DLLInfo must specify DLL, and NaN chol_factor expectation mismatch. Need reproduce locally with installed-package R CMD check where possible, split into minimal regression tests or CI dependency/config fixes, then rerun Actions.
set.title: R-CMD-check fails on all platform jobs after deployment push
